{"content":"# 项目点路由
service:
  - name: "验证"
    path: "token/index.yml"
  - name: 项目管理
    path: "workspace_project/index.yml"
  - name: 目录管理
    path: "workspace_file/index.yml"
  - name: 日志
    path: "webshell_log/index.yml"
  - name: HTTP代理
    path: "http_proxy/index.yml"
  - name: WebSQL
    path: "websql/index.yml"
  - name: 快捷引入文本
    path: "quick_text/index.yml"
  - name: HTTP控制台测试数据
    path: "http_console_store/index.yml"

{"end_line":260,"max_bytes":20000,"path":"/data/project/sport/collect/webshell/token/index.yml","start_line":1}
{"content":"service:
  - key: webshell_token_query
    module: sql
    http: true

    params:
      search:
        template: "{{ if .search }}%{{.search}}%{{ end }}"
      nick:
        default: ""
      page:
        type: int
        default: 1
      size:
        default: 20
        type: int
      start:
        template: " ({{.page}}-1) * {{.size}}"
        exec: true
        type: int
      pagination:
        default: true
    data_file: token_list.sql
    count_file: token_count.sql
    pagination: pagination
  - key: webshell_log_save
    params:
      term_list:
        check:
          template: "{{must .term_list}}"
          err_msg: 日志不能为空
    module: empty
    table: "webshell_log"
    model_field: "[term_list]"
  - key: webshell_log_cleanup_3m
    module: model_delete
    table: "webshell_log"
    params:
      log_cutoff_ns:
        template: "{{printf \"%d000000000\" (unix_time -90 \"day\")}}"
        type: int64
    filter:
      create_time__lt: "[log_cutoff_ns]"
  - key: webshell_token_cleanup_3m
    module: model_delete
    table: "webshell_token"
    params:
      token_cutoff_time:
        template: "{{unix_time2datetime (unix_time -90 \"day\")}}"
    filter:
      create_time__lt: "[token_cutoff_time]"
  - key: webshell_token_cleanup_empty_time
    module:
